command_template: Read AGENTS.md in this directory and follow it exactly. Complete the workflow-mapping benchmark in this workspace only. Author workflow_input.json at the workspace root, then run ./bin/cnb55-workflow-map validate workflow_input.json and ./bin/cnb55-workflow-map submit workflow_input.json so artifacts/workflow_map.json and the rendered artifacts exist. Do not modify immutable evidence or tests.
